hero.subtitle: Kwarewar AI ta ritaya da canjin aiki — wanda aka keɓance ga ƙasarka, kuɗinka, sana'arka, da halin kuɗinka. Daga Lagos zuwa London, shirya da wayo.

landing.trust: Koyarwar NDPR • Bayananka yana da tsaro & mai zaman kansa
landing.featuresHeading: Duk abin da kuke buƙata don sake kunna wuta
landing.featuresSubheading: AI tana yin aikin wahala. Kai ka mayar da hankali kan gina makomarka.

assessment.title: Tantancewar Shirin AI
assessment.desc: Sami naku na musamman na shirye-shiryen ritaya tare da binciken AI na bayanan martaba.

ideas.title: Ra'ayoyin Kasuwanci da Aka Keɓance Muku
ideas.desc: Karɓi ra'ayoyin kasuwanci 3 da aka tallafa da bayanai dangane da ƙwarewarku, sashinku, da yanayin kasuwa na gida.

plans.title: Tsare-tsaren Kasuwanci nan take
plans.desc: Kira babban nunawa na sana'a da tsare-tsaren kasuwanci tare da danna ɗaya ta amfani da AI.

hub.title: Cibiyar Haɓakawa
hub.desc: Malamai: ƙirƙiri darussa, tambayoyi, kuma kaddamar da makarantar AI ƙarama. Sami kuɗi yayin da kuke koyarwa.

bottomCta.title: A shirye kuke don tsara aikinku na biyu?
bottomCta.subtitle: Shiga fiye da ma'aikatan gwamnati 500 da ke amfani da Reignite don tabbatar da makomarsu ta kuɗi.
